archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Premium B2B SaaS variant)

rules: Use #0B1020 as the absolute base background.
Use #131A2A for cards, sidebars, and elevated surfaces.
Apply 1px subtle borders (#1E293B) to distinguish surfaces rather than heavy shadows.
CTAs and active states should use the Primary color (#4F46E5).
Use Accent (#8B5CF6) and Secondary (#06B6D4) sparingly for 'AI Magic' states, confidence scores, and generative text.
Avoid pure white text; use #F8FAFC to reduce eye strain.
DO NOT USE Inter or Roboto.
Use Outfit for all headings to provide a modern, geometric, tech-forward feel.
Use Manrope for body copy for excellent legibility at small sizes.
Apply tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) on headings H1 and H2.
Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards against the dark background.

grids.dashboard_dense: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6

rules: Containers with borders must use internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to avoid text collision.
Use The Control Room Grid for dashboards: tight gaps, full height cards.
Use The Tetris Grid for marketing/landing: varied column spans to create asymmetry.

libraries: Shadcn UI (heavily customized for Dark Theme)

buttons.primary: bg-[#4F46E5] text-white hover:bg-[#4338CA] rounded-md px-6 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#1E293B] text-[#F8FAFC] hover:bg-[#131A2A] rounded-md px-6 py-2 transition-colors

inputs.base: bg-[#0B1020] border border-[#1E293B] text-[#F8FAFC] rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#4F46E5]/50 focus:border-[#4F46E5]

rules: Avoid deeply rounded corners; stick to rounded-md or rounded-xl for a structural, premium B2B feel.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
Always set explicit text color on hover.

landing.layout: Asymmetric Bento Grid, generous vertical spacing (py-24).
landing.visuals: Hero with dark gradient overlay, abstract background. AI generative text glow.

company_research.visuals: Flat surfaces, subtle borders. High contrast data points.

features: AI recommended cards with confidence scores (92/87/84/79)
gtm_ideation.visuals: Highlight confidence scores using Accent and Success colors based on value.

command_center.layout: Multi-column layout with fixed Sidebar and fixed Right Panel (AI Copilot).
command_center.visuals: Most impressive page. Use Recharts for channel allocation. Glassmorphism on AI Copilot panel.

features: Tabs: Social Content, Strategy Files, Master Package
content_export.layout: Clean, list-based and grid-based views depending on tab.
content_export.visuals: Prominent file icons, structured data tables.

global_elements.ai_assistant: Persistent floating button or side panel, stylized with gradient borders.
global_elements.navigation: Sticky glassmorphic top nav on marketing; Solid vertical sidebar on dashboard.
global_elements.theme_toggle: Should support dark/light, but default/primary is dark mode.

hero_background.description: Dark blue abstract gradient, perfect for blending into the #0B1020 background behind hero text.

feature_abstract.description: Purple/pink curve abstract gradient for 'AI Features' sections.

dashboard_mockup.description: Dark mode digital assistant interface for marketing visual context.

team_meeting.description: Professional team meeting for 'About' or 'Who is it for' sections.

logo_1.description: Abstract logo shape to use for partner/trusted-by sections.

rules: Images used in hero sections MUST use a gradient overlay to ensure text contrast (e.g., bg-black/50 or from-black/80 to-transparent).
Do NOT use placeholder text or dummy image URLs. Use the exact URLs provided.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: lucide-react, recharts, framer-motion, clsx, tailwind-merge.
Add 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' fonts from Google Fonts in the HTML head and configure them in tailwind.config.js.
Ensure all 5 pages are distinct and fully implemented based on the problem statement.
Build the 'Command Center' (Page 4) as the hero dashboard with highest visual polish.
Apply data-testid to every button, tab, and form input.
Never use generic fonts like Inter/Roboto.
Strictly adhere to the dark mode #0B1020 background and #131A2A surface colors.
